rootCause: Playwright test helper trySelectItem only targeted the legacy .item-list selector. The ItemSelector component now renders its dropdown options under .items-list with .item-row buttons, so the helper never saw any options and timed out every process creation test.
resolution: Updated the shared ITEM_SELECTOR_OPTION_LOCATORS list to cover the current .items-list/.item-row structure and added a unit test that fails if those class names drift, preventing future regressions.
